command_shape: env RUN_ID=torchtitan_direct_dsv4_mori_sharedkv_likl_tritonswiglu_8x_s4096_gbs128_steps2_20260602 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_SHAREDKV_SCATTER_MODE=auto CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot MASTER_PORT=29583 experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

comparison_to_prior_safeauto.read: Triton SwiGLU owner-rank VJP composes with the shared-KV sparse path at 8x target shape but does not improve end-to-end throughput versus the prior padded-SwiGLU safe-auto run.

read: This is the composed 8x target-shape canary with both current gap-closure branches active: shared-KV sparse attention plus LI triton_tl_dot, and MORI+AITER routed padded MoE with Triton SwiGLU owner-rank VJP. It passes two optimizer steps with clean process-group teardown and target-band step-2 throughput, but the unchanged throughput versus the prior safe-auto run says the remaining wall is not solved by SwiGLU vector fusion alone.
promotion_read: Retain as integration evidence only. Promotion still needs final fused sparse MLA/LI/compressor backward plus a production grouped MoE training-GEMM backward path.
